steps.title: Find agreement across texts
steps.content: Text 1 says Ailey's admiration for jazz can be felt in the rhythms and beats his works used, and it names jazz musicians he collaborated with. Text 2 says jazz is present throughout his work and explains that jazz-like improvisation shaped his choreography.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported claims
steps.content: A is unsupported because neither text says how dancers felt about Ailey's approach. C invents audience unfamiliarity, even though Text 1 only says Ailey brought jazz to life for audiences. D mentions multiple genres, but both texts discuss jazz only. Both authors support a strong jazz influence on Ailey's work. The answer is B.
